audit_items.proof_trace: All three functions in psearchctrl.c guard every pointer before dereference: ld is checked via explicit null-return at each function entry (L87, L187, L267); ber is checked after allocation (L102-105, L284-287); value is a stack variable (always non-NULL); all optional output parameters (chgtypep, prevdnp, chgnumpresentp, chgnump) are individually null-checked before write. No unchecked dereference path exists.
